name: Masked HERO Anki
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｍ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マスクドヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鬼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Must be Special Summoned by "Mask Change". This card can attack directly, but when it does so using this effect, the battle damage inflicted to your opponent is halved. When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can add 1 "Change" Quick-Play Spell Card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Masked HERO Anki" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Must be Special Summoned by "Mask Change". This card can attack directly, but when it does so using this effect, the battle damage inflicted to your opponent is halved. When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can add 1 "Change" Quick-Play Spell Card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Masked HERO Anki" once per turn.

sets.set: Premium Gold: Return of the Bling

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Must be Special Summoned by a specific card effect
